case_title: COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C VS. LAWRENCE E SERELES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MELISSA KOHLWECK IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KOHL, JAMES LOUIS SUBSTITUTED FOR POLLARD, RALPH LOUIS AS ATTORNEY FOR COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERELES, LAWRENCE E AN INDIVIDUAL $9,889.45 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,889.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERELES, LAWRENCE E AN INDIVIDUAL $3,196.75 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,017.70 INTEREST, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,023.45, -NOTATIONS MADE ON THE ORIGINAL CONTRACT PER CRC 234
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $4,836.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CA. C ORP. SERVED JUL-20-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SERELES, LAWRENCE E AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $149.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SERELES, LAWRENCE E AN INDIVIDUAL
